name: PR Review Agent
description: AI-powered GitHub pull request reviewer. Paste any public PR URL and get an instant summary, list of potential issues, and actionable suggestions — powered by a Lamatic flow.
features: Fetches PR diff via GitHub API (no auth needed for public repos)
Flags potential bugs, security issues, and edge cases
Returns structured JSON: summary, issues[], suggestions[], verdict
Verdict badge: Approve / Needs Changes / Discuss
